raw: This is an e-voucher . Pass is emailed to the Patron; Print out the pass or display it on your phone at the Museum entrance. Each pass admits up to 4 people at $2 per person to any Massachusetts Audubon Wildlife Sanctuary, including Drumlin Farm in Lincoln, MA. (Children under age 2 are always free.) Holiday calendar, days open and hours of operation vary by property - please check the Mass Audubon website, massaudubon.org , for more details. Drumlin Farm Hours: Tuesday–Sunday, 9am-5pm • Closed Mondays (except holidays) • Closed on Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year's Day. For the most up-to-date information on the Drumlin Farm programs and hours, please visit their website .

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: Children under age 2 are always free
